output_mode_requested.description: The mode requested by the agent before enforcement.

output_mode_effective.description: The mode actually permitted after ceiling enforcement (actual_mode from enforcer).

output_mode_ceiling.description: Maximum admissible mode computed by enforce_output_mode from the record.

consequence_tier.description: Consequence Materiality Tier from the downgrade record (0=cosmetic, 1=procedural, 2=structural).

consequence_materiality_reason.description: Human-readable reason for the consequence tier classification.

enforcement_source.description: Identifies which module produced the output_mode decision. Locked to prevent receipt-local ceiling recomputation.

fallback_weakens_enforcement.description: Always false. Manual fallback uses the same enforcer and semantics as native hook path.

manual_fallback_reason.description: Reason native hook was unavailable (e.g. non_native_hook_agent, hook_install_failed).

memory_write_claim_verified.description: Whether a memory_write_performed self-report was backed by daily memory evidence.

memory_write_claim_verification_reason.description: Reason emitted by memory write claim verification.

memory_authority_guard_ran.description: Whether the memory authority guard ran during closeout.

memory_authority_scope.description: Scope reported by the memory authority guard.

memory_authority_warning_codes.description: Warning codes reported by the memory authority guard.

memory_unbound_count.description: Count of unbound memory entries reported by the memory authority guard.

memory_workflow_dispatch_ran.description: Whether the memory workflow dispatcher ran during closeout.

memory_workflow_status.description: Status reported by the memory workflow dispatcher.

memory_task_classification.description: Task classification reported by the memory workflow dispatcher.

memory_completion_claim_allowed.description: Whether the memory workflow dispatcher allowed a memory completion claim.

memory_workflow_warning_codes.description: Warning codes reported by the memory workflow dispatcher.

memory_workflow_blocker_codes.description: Blocker codes reported by the memory workflow dispatcher.

memory_workflow_guard_summary.description: Guard summary forwarded through the memory workflow dispatcher.
